name: wemik
description: 🛡️ Wemik — a secure AI chat app for regulated industries. Sensitive data is detected and redacted locally, real values stay in a local encrypted vault, and only redacted prompts ever reach the model — so banks, government, and healthcare can use AI safely.

scripts.test: node scripts/check-secrets.js && node --check scripts/check-secrets.js && node --check lib/audit.js && node --check lib/auth.js && node --check lib/env.js && node --check lib/db.js && node --check lib/gateway/pii.js && node --check lib/gateway/policy.js && node --check lib/gateway/providers.js && node --check lib/gateway/samples.js && node --check lib/gateway/engine.js && node --check lib/chat/vaultCrypto.js && node --check lib/chat/models.js && node --check lib/chat/store.js && node --check lib/chat/settings.js && node --check lib/chat/engine.js && node --check dashboard/server.js && echo 'syntax ok'

author: Jorge Elizalde
